name: IoT Connect Logo Animation
description: Standard SVG-in-JSON format for mobile and web cross-platform injection.
svg_raw: <svg width="300" height="300" viewBox="0 0 300 300" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><style>@keyframes pulse {0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; } 50% { transform: scale(1.1); opacity: 1; }} @keyframes wave {0% { transform: scale(0.3); opacity: 0; } 20% { opacity: 0.5; } 100% { transform: scale(2.5); opacity: 0; }} .core { transform-origin: center; animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite; fill: #0873E6; } .wave { transform-origin: center; stroke: #0873E6; stroke-width: 2; fill: none; animation: wave 3s linear infinite; } .wave-2 { animation-delay: 1.5s; }</style><circle class="wave" cx="150" cy="150" r="40" /><circle class="wave wave-2" cx="150" cy="150" r="40" /><circle class="core" cx="150" cy="150" r="25" /></svg>
